creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
Distfile Changed.  New diff below.
 
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile ./munger/Makefile
 --- /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile     Mon Jan 15 09:56:03 2007
 +++ ./munger/Makefile   Mon Mar 26 14:06:21 2007
 @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
   #
 
   PORTNAME=      munger
 -PORTVERSION=   4.123
 +PORTVERSION=   4.124
   CATEGORIES=    lang
   MASTER_SITES=  http://www.mammothcheese.ca/
 
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo ./munger/distinfo
 --- /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo     Mon Jan 15 09:56:03 2007
 +++ ./munger/distinfo   Tue Mar 27 10:10:51 2007
 @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 -MD5 (munger-4.123.tar.gz) = 175591a6dcb02dbb0f01569c0e9e60d2
 -SHA256 (munger-4.123.tar.gz) =
 163dd5adfd631da3af83e48b1bef057380f76a930ae9730a78705ca1b632f18a
 -SIZE (munger-4.123.tar.gz) = 303641
 +MD5 (munger-4.124.tar.gz) = 9d82c512361d8a37d48253d9bba0fd07
 +SHA256 (munger-4.124.tar.gz) =
 807c8e8a2efce4db46bf8fcdaf0ef0e5765543e3f9ebcd9418f58ad84e13ec5e
 +SIZE (munger-4.124.tar.gz) = 304075
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/pkg-plist ./munger/pkg-plist
 --- /usr/ports/lang/munger/pkg-plist    Mon Jan 15 09:56:03 2007
 +++ ./munger/pkg-plist  Mon Mar 26 14:06:25 2007
 @@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
   bin/munger
 -lib/libmunger.so.16
 +lib/libmunger.so.17
   %%DKNS_BIN%%
   %%DATADIR%%/echo.munger
   %%DATADIR%%/msh.munger
